theme: The Best Way to Relieve Stress

sentences.english: What is the best way to relieve stress?
sentences.korean: 스트레스를 해소하는 가장 좋은 방법은 무엇입니까?

sentences.english: I believe the best way to relieve stress is through regular physical exercise.
sentences.korean: 정기적인 신체 운동이 스트레스를 해소하는 가장 좋은 방법이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: When you exercise your body releases endorphins which are natural mood boosters.
sentences.korean: 운동하면 몸이 엔도르핀을 분비하는데 천연 기분 향상제예요.

sentences.english: For me jogging for just thirty minutes completely changes my mental state.
sentences.korean: 나의 경우 30분만 조깅해도 정신 상태가 완전히 바뀌어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
The Best Way to Relieve Stress
A Hobby You Want to Start

theme: The Best Way to Relieve Stress

sentences.english: I go from feeling overwhelmed and anxious to feeling calm and focused.
sentences.korean: 압도당하고 불안한 느낌에서 차분하고 집중된 느낌으로 바뀌어요.

sentences.english: Unlike watching TV or scrolling through social media exercise actually addresses the root cause of stress by lowering cortisol levels.
sentences.korean: TV를 보거나 소셜 미디어를 스크롤하는 것과 달리 운동은 코르티솔 수치를 낮춰 스트레스의 근본 원인을 실제로 해결해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Describe a place outside your actual home where yo
The Best Way to Relieve Stress
